cards.front: What is the primary focus of the chalk and talk method?
cards.back: The primary focus of the chalk and talk method is on the lecturer (teacher) to deliver information to the students through oral explanations

cards.front: What is the main advantage of using PowerPoint presentations in teaching?
cards.back: The main advantage of using PowerPoint presentations is that they can be easily printed or distributed, making it convenient for students to access course materials

cards.front: What is the role of the lecturer in the chalk and talk method?
cards.back: The lecturer plays a central role in delivering information to students, answering questions, and facilitating discussion

cards.front: What type of learning environment is ideal for chalk and talk method?
cards.back: An ideal learning environment for the chalk and talk method is a traditional classroom setting with minimal distractions

cards.front: What is a key limitation of the chalk and talk method?
cards.back: A key limitation of the chalk and talk method is that it may not be suitable for students who learn better through visual aids or hands-on activities
